topic: Medicare and Medicaid Requirements for Nephrology Practices

primary_sources.name: Medicare Benefit Policy Manual Chapter 11 - End Stage Renal Disease Services
primary_sources.relevance: Defines MCP billing requirements and ESRD service coverage rules

primary_sources.name: CY 2024 Physician Fee Schedule Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes MIPS requirements and payment adjustments for nephrology practices

primary_sources.name: Medicare Claims Processing Manual Chapter 8 - Outpatient ESRD Services
primary_sources.relevance: Provides billing and documentation requirements for dialysis facility services

primary_sources.name: Stark Law and Anti-Kickback Statute Final Rules
primary_sources.relevance: Defines compliance requirements for physician self-referral and kickback prevention in nephrology

secondary_sources.name: ASN Practice Management Guidelines for Nephrology
secondary_sources.relevance: Provides practical guidance on Medicare billing and compliance for nephrology practices

gaps: Limited recent guidance on APP billing specifically for nephrology services
Evolving telehealth billing requirements post-COVID for nephrology practices
